title: Compliance: Python link_layer.py replay protection
description: Policy: 02-physical-link.md §4.4. File: python/src/lichen/link/link_layer.py. Status: COMPLIANT. Line 137 initializes epoch to random.randint(128, 255) per spec. Replay window uses 24-bit logical counter (epoch<<16|seqnum) correctly rejecting old epochs.
